concerns.text: Tasks T030 and T031 implement the Kuncheva index for stability measurement, directly violating Spec FR-006 and SC-003 which mandate the Jaccard index and Spearman rank correlation. This is a semantic weakening of the acceptance criteria.

Tasks T019 and T020 specify '3-fold CV' but the Plan.md Complexity Tracking table overrides this with '10-Fold Repeated CV' for small datasets. The tasks do not reflect the Plan's deviation from Spec FR-004, creating a silent drift where the implementation may not match the spec's explicit 3-fold requirement.

Task T013 mentions 'C × Cooling Rate' as an example but fails to explicitly include the 'cooling rate × holding time' interaction required by Spec FR-003. This risks partial coverage of the functional requirement.

Task T021 conflates 'computing SHAP summary plots' with 'ranking features'. Spec FR-005 requires the generation of the actual plot artifacts. The task description focuses on data computation, risking the omission of the visual deliverable.
